历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 6650 → 6336 → 5441 → 6205 → 9610. In 2025, due to the first implementation of the new college entrance examination (physics category/history category) ranking system adjustment in Shanxi Province, the ranking significantly shifted backward to about 9610, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2960 over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 9610. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shanxi Province was 87 in 2021, 84 in 2022, 82 in 2023, 82 in 2024, and 89 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 89, unchanged from 2025, and the plan factor has a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has continuously risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation in 2024 was significantly negative, mainly due to poor enrollment communication and unreasonable major settings leading to a sharp drop in the admission score line of about 500 places, but no sustained negative signals were seen in the 2025 and 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity total ranking 13th (high heat), with cafeteria feature videos gaining significant exposure, overall application attention is relatively high; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grass Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, a total of 7 A- and above disciplines, with agricultural and forestry disciplines at the national top level, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering remains high, aligning with the university's offered majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering; the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province in 2026 is about 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, with a slight reduction in candidate scale, slightly easing competition; China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Shanxi candidates; the university's enrollment in Shanxi Province accounts for about 4.7% of the national total enrollment (2025), which is moderately high, and the willingness of local candidates to apply is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the baseline ranking of 9610 after the 2025 new college entrance examination ranking system adjustment, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in physics category candidates in Shanxi (slightly easing competition), the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (enhanced appeal), and high Douyin exposure, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 9460, with a range of 8960–9960.

Majors related to the Yantai Research Institute have relatively lower ranking thresholds and can be used as safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 802 → 742 → 1010 → 943 → 2329. In 2025, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination (history/physics categories) in Shanxi Province, the ranking system was adjusted, causing a significant drop to about 2329. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2329. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shanxi Province was 13 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 34 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 34, unchanged from 2025, making the plan factor neutral for competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science University Rankings has steadily risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, indicating improving comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was clearly negative, mainly due to poor enrollment communication and unreasonable major settings leading to abnormal admission cutoffs. Its Douyin popularity ranks 13th (high heat), indicating high overall application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 7 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, and Food Science and Engineering, making its agricultural and forestry disciplines top in the country. Liberal arts majors mainly include Law, Business Administration, Communication Studies, and English, which have average relevance to the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially hot (recommended), Business Administration is divided and wait-and-see, and Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province is about 63,113, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (-25.6%) from 84,879 in 2025, indicating a notable reduction in examinee scale and a clear easing of competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Shanxi Province examinees. The university's enrollment plan for history category in Shanxi Province increased to 34 in 2025 (doubled from 17 in 2024 for liberal arts), expanding enrollment opportunities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of 2329 after the 2025 new college entrance examination ranking system adjustment, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant reduction of about 25.6% in history category examinees in Shanxi Province (competition significantly eased), and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (increased appeal), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2249, with a range of 1912–2586.
